---
language: swift
exerciseType: 1
---

# --description--

在 Swift 中，字符串变量只能使用双引号来声明：
```swift
let x = "May"
```

# --instructions--

声明一个名为 `month` 的变量，值为 `june`。

# --before-seed--

```swift
// DO NOT EDIT FROM HERE
import Foundation

var _testCount = 0
var _testFailedCount = 0
func tryCatch(_ assertion: Bool) {
    _testCount += 1
    if !assertion {
        _testFailedCount += 1
        print("Test Case '--err-t\(_testCount)--' failed")
    }
}
// DO NOT EDIT UNTIL HERE
```

# --asserts--

`month` 必须等于 `"june"`。

```swift
tryCatch(month == "june")
```

# --after-asserts--

```swift
print("Executed \(_testCount) tests, with \(_testFailedCount) failures")
```
# --solutions--

```swift
let month = "june"
```
